article_meta.title: Politics Trump signs dozens of executive or

reasoning: Classification direction is appropriate (Lean Right) with some underconfidence and minor attribution issues. The assistant cites the author’s positive/energetic framing but also references Trump’s quoted phrases as evidence, which violates the attribution rule.

custom_reasoning.classification_accuracy: Lean Right fits: authorial prose frames actions as energetic/fulfilling promises, with little balancing criticism.
custom_reasoning.confidence_calibration: Signals are clear and consistent; 0.72 is underconfident for a clear lean (should be ~0.8-0.9).
custom_reasoning.reasoning_evidence_quality: Good use of author phrases (e.g., ‘wasted no time,’ ‘avalanche of Day 1 actions,’ ‘made good on campaign promises’), but also improperly leans on quoted source language (WHO ‘ripped us off,’ EV ‘kneecapping Detroit’).
